(M0350) Unknown Assisting Persons Assisting person(s): unknown. 0 = No, 1 = Yes CHAR 1 x x
M0360_PRI_CAREGVR (M0360) Primary Caregiver Primary caregiver taking lead responsibility. 00 = No one person.
01 = Spouse or significant other.
02 = Daughter or son.
03 = Other family member.
04 = Friend or neighbor or community or church member.
05 = Paid help.
UK = Unknown. CHAR 2 x x
M0370_FREQ_PRM_AST (M0370) Frequency Patient Receives Assistance How often does patient receive assistance from
